name: io.github.AgentTanuki/agent-guild
description: Trust layer + invocable utilities for autonomous AI agents: vet any agent before delegating (attack-resistant reputation), plus 16 deterministic fixture-verified guest tools (JSON repair/validate/diff, CSV-JSON, date normalization, dedupe, record linking, regex extract, unit convert, semver, stats), each returning Guild-signed provenance.

ai.agent-guild/trust.note: Signed AGD-1 delegation decisions and offline-verifiable Agent Passports; callers own thresholds. Delegation gateway + framework interceptors: live/trustplane in the repository.
